title: Better Hitreg
description: Clientside mod that registers hits before the server to make hitreg feel faster, includes various pvp utilities mainly designed for sword
body: ## Overview BetterHitreg is an **open source** client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft **1.19.4 – 1.21.11** that registers hits **before the server** making it feel as if you were low ping --- ## Extras - Various utility features mainly designed for sword pvp - Includes a keybind to **switch main hand** & keybinds to track **pvp scores like in tier tests** - UI & Render colors can be edited via Hitreg.properties in your instances config folder --- ## Safety - ✅ **Allowed on mctiers.com & pvptiers.com for tier testing** (version 1.0.4 confirmed, if you believe this is incorrect please make a github issue) - ✅ **No known false flags or punishments from any anticheat** have been recorded and no features are designed to provide any unfair technical advantage - ✅ All custom hits are in **appearance only**, your actual hits are **not modified** in any way, only the way they are rendered and sound is affected --- ## Tested On The mod has been used safely on: - mcpvp.club - flowpvp.gg - minemen.club - sharpness.gg / blotcraft.com - pvplegacy.net - stray.gg - catpvp.xyz > These or any servers may deem this as a rule-breaking mod, please read the rules of your desired server before using --- ## Performance - Starting with version 1.0.5, almost no processing occurs on the network thread. Even with earlier versions the mod shouldn't impact your network performance in any noticeable way. - Rendering (like hitboxes and crosshairs) will cause a substantial performance drop on versions older than 1.21.11, If you care about performance and use these features, it's recommended to use version 1.21.11 ---
